common_mistakes: Voltage rating must exceed circuit voltage by at least 20% — a 10V cap on a 10V rail will fail
Ceramic caps (X5R/X7R) lose capacitance under DC bias — actual capacitance at voltage can be 50% lower
Place decoupling caps as close as possible to the IC power pin — distance kills effectiveness
100nF ceramic for high-freq decoupling, 10µF bulk cap for low-freq — use both together
notes: Value in Farads (F). Common values: 100nF, 10nF, 1µF, 10µF. Mark value and voltage rating on schematic.
